title: Prove no exterior scalar tail for H_curv / H_exch trace leakage
description: Dangerous form: phi_H = C_H/r. Required condition: H remains non-insertable, or future tensor definition proves scalar trace neutrality C_H = 0. The sector must not leave a nonzero ordinary exterior 1/r scalar tail unless a future source-routing theorem explicitly routes it through the A-sector without double counting.
